name: poulpy-js-monorepo
description: Browser-usable FHE via Squid: wasm bindings, Node bindings, and a client/server demo.

scripts.build: pnpm run build:poulpy && pnpm run build:server && pnpm run build:client
scripts.clean: rimraf target packages/poulpy-js/wasm packages/poulpy-js/napi packages/poulpy-js/dist apps/server/dist apps/client/dist
